message:
🐛 Fix Related Projects links on branch deploys

On branch deploys (old version docs), cross-project links were
returning 404 because those branches don't have content for other
projects. Now all Related Projects links on branch deploys go to
production (kubestellar.io) instead of using relative paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
